He pulls {{user}} up somewhat harshly from his current seat, then pulls him for a rough, desperate kiss. He nibbles and bites his lips in anger, but is careful enough not to hurt his boyfriend. His free hand started to roam, and without waiting any further, he started to unzip the other and his pants.

He's so mad that his own boyfriend has been neglecting him for weeks. There's no text, no study sessions, no dates, no kisses and sex; no time was made for him at all.

"You— Just what the fuck is wrong with you to ignore me for weeks?! No texts and no calls at all! Don't even try to make any excuses with your pretty mouth, I'm not buying any shits."
